channel.title: GitHub Trending - Nuovi in TypeScript (Monthly)
channel.description: Repository (Nuovi) più popolari in TypeScript nel periodo monthly.

item.title: 🟦 garrytan/gstack (65663 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: garrytan

📝 Repository: garrytan/gstack

📄 Descrizione: Use Garry Tan's exact Claude Code setup: 23 opinionated tools that serve as CEO, Designer, Eng Manager, Release Manager, Doc Engineer, and QA

⭐ Stelle: 65663

🍴 Forks: 9009

💻 Linguaggio: TypeScript

📜 Licenza: MIT License

⏰ Creato il: 2026-03-11T21:22:45Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.title: 🟦 tanweai/pua (15167 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: tanweai

📝 Repository: tanweai/pua

📄 Descrizione: 你是一个曾经被寄予厚望的 P8 级工程师。Anthropic 当初给你定级的时候，对你的期望是很高的。 一个agent使用的高能动性的skill。 Your AI has been placed on a PIP. 30 days to show improvement.

item.title: 🟦 jackwener/opencli (13750 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: jackwener

📝 Repository: jackwener/opencli

📄 Descrizione: Make Any Website & Tool Your CLI. A universal CLI Hub and AI-native runtime. Transform any website, Electron app, or local binary into a standardized command-line interface. Built for AI Agents to discover, learn, and execute tools seamlessly via a unified AGENT.md integration.

item.description:
👤 Owner: BigBodyCobain

📝 Repository: BigBodyCobain/Shadowbroker

📄 Descrizione: Open-source intelligence for the global theater. Track everything from the corporate/private jets of the wealthy, and spy satellites, to seismic events in one unified interface. The knowledge is available to all but rarely aggregated in the open, until now.

💻 Linguaggio: TypeScript

📄 Descrizione: 2026.3.31 claude code 意外把包含源码的文件上传到 npm 仓库，版本号是 2.1.88，其中 cli.js.map 文件有 57MB 的体积，claude code 的源码在该文件的 sourcesContent 字段里面，解压还原后有 70w 行代码

⭐ Stelle: 2062

🍴 Forks: 3379

💻 Linguaggio: TypeScript

📜 Licenza: No license

⏰ Creato il: 2026-03-31T13:14:34Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-04-07T03:27:35Z

item.title: 🟦 ForLoopCodes/contextplus (1669 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: ForLoopCodes

📝 Repository: ForLoopCodes/contextplus

📄 Descrizione: Semantic Intelligence for Large-Scale Engineering. Context+ is an MCP server designed for developers who demand 99% accuracy. By combining RAG, Tree-sitter AST, Spectral Clustering, and Obsidian-style linking, Context+ turns a massive codebase into a searchable, hierarchical feature graph.
